# ST CMSIS Device F4

This directory provides licensing and upstream information for
STMicroelectronics CMSIS Device F4 files used in this project.

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/STMicroelectronics/cmsis-device-f4

License:
Apache License 2.0

Covered files in this project include ST CMSIS device files located under:
- STM32F4xx/Device/Include/
- STM32F4xx/Device/Source/
